summary: Added deterministic daemon circuit-breaker resume coverage for generated cascade task skipping and vetted recovery task prioritization.
target_task: Task checkbox-447: Add daemon circuit-breaker resume coverage proving blocked generated cascade tasks stay skipped while a fresh vetted recovery task is selected first.
validation_commands: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
